items.title: BMW bumps the 7 Series for 2027, adds all-new battery
items.summary: The 2027 7 Series is available as an EV, with an inline-six, or an inline-six PHEV.

items.title: Salmon raises $100M in equity and debt to bring digital credit to underbanked Filipinos
items.summary: Salmon is targeting underbanked Filipinos, with little to no credit history, as well as people unhappy with the incumbent lenders' reliability issues.
